title: 3-Hour Endurance Foundation
description: Pure aerobic base for event prep

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 10:48 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 70% for 10:48. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 0% done. 171 minutes left. This feels like cheating. It's not. It's science. Probably.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 10 minutes of base work. This feels like nothing. That's exactly the point.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 160:12 at 75%. Conversational pace — should be able to talk in full sentences.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 10 minutes to go. Consistency over intensity. You're doing the work that matters.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: also known as 'why am I even here' pace. 160:12 at 75%.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay patient. Stay easy. 75% for 160:12. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 171 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 94% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 94% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 60% FTP × 10:48. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
